events.description: segment opens, dark background with subtle grid pattern
VS Code icon + marketplace title slides in from below
big 40,000 number counts up from zero — key stat
green shield badge appears — Microsoft reviews label
green reviewed bar section grows in proportional bar
massive red long tail section expands across bar
UNMODERATED warning badge pulses red with glow
scene crossfades from marketplace overview to discovery
magnifying glass + researchers discovered header slides in
36 extension tiles appear in rapid stagger across grid
18 tiles turn red one by one with bug icons — malicious reveal
big 18 number scales up in red — malicious extension count
7M installs counter animates up with download icon — shocking stat
crypto mining badge appears with bitcoin + pickaxe icons, pulsing glow
